<?php namespace Faker\Provider\id_ID; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { /** * @var array some email domains */ protected static $freeEmailDomain = [ 'gmail.com', 'yahoo.com', 'gmail.co.id', 'yahoo.co.id', ]; /** * General tld and local tld * * @see http://idwebhost.com/ * @see http://domain.id/ */ protected static $tld = [ 'com', 'net', 'org', 'asia', 'tv', 'biz', 'info', 'in', 'name', 'co', 'ac.id', 'sch.id', 'go.id', 'mil.id', 'co.id', 'or.id', 'web.id', 'my.id', 'biz.id', 'desa.id', 'id', ]; }
